description: Phase 10 - Security Hardening: Create 5 new security utility modules with comprehensive tests in artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/
steps: Create directory artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/ for all security modules

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/AuditLogService.ts - Immutable append-only audit log with hash chain (SHA-256 via Web Crypto API or manual implementation). Track document operations: view, download, create, update, delete, approve, reject. Each entry has: id, timestamp, userId, operation, documentId, previousHash, currentHash. Gate behind AUDIT_HASH_CHAIN feature flag. Store in localStorage as serialized JSON. Provide methods: logOperation(), getAuditTrail(), verifyChainIntegrity(), getEntriesByDocument(), getEntriesByUser()
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/AuditLogService.test.ts - Test all operations, hash chain integrity verification, tamper detection, filtering by document/user, feature flag gating

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/rateLimiting.ts - Client-side rate limit tracking. Track request counts per endpoint per configurable time window. Methods: checkLimit(endpoint), recordRequest(endpoint), getRemainingRequests(endpoint), isLimited(endpoint). Uses sliding window algorithm. Configurable maxRequests and windowMs per endpoint.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/rateLimiting.test.ts - Test rate limit enforcement, window expiration, per-endpoint isolation, configuration

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/uploadValidation.ts - Enhanced upload security beyond existing fileValidation.ts. Validate file headers (magic bytes) match declared extension. Reject dangerous MIME types (application/x-executable, text/html with script tags, application/x-msdownload, etc.). Check for embedded scripts in SVG/HTML. Provide validateUploadSecurity(file) returning detailed ValidationResult.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/uploadValidation.test.ts - Test magic byte mismatch detection, dangerous MIME rejection, embedded script detection, clean file acceptance

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/sessionSecurity.ts - Session timeout tracking with configurable idle duration. Idle detection via timestamp tracking. Secure token rotation interface (scheduleRotation, getTokenAge, isExpired). Methods: startSession(), recordActivity(), isSessionExpired(), getIdleDuration(), shouldRotateToken(). Configurable timeoutMs and rotationIntervalMs.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/sessionSecurity.test.ts - Test session expiration, activity recording resets timer, token rotation scheduling, idle detection

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/permissionGuard.ts - Frontend permission checking utility. Define Permission type (view, edit, delete, approve, admin). Define Role type (viewer, editor, approver, admin). Validate user role + object-level access before rendering actions. Methods: hasPermission(user, permission, resource), canPerformAction(user, action, document), getAvailableActions(user, document). Role hierarchy: admin > approver > editor > viewer.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/permissionGuard.test.ts - Test role hierarchy, object-level permissions, action availability per role, edge cases (null user, unknown role)
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/security/index.ts - Barrel export for all security modules
acceptance_criteria: All 5 security modules compile without TypeScript errors (npx tsc --noEmit)
All security tests pass when running: cd artifacts/edms && npx vitest run src/lib/security/
AuditLogService properly chains hashes and detects tampering
Rate limiting correctly tracks and enforces limits per endpoint
Upload validation catches magic byte mismatches and dangerous content
Session security tracks idle time and expiration correctly
Permission guard enforces role hierarchy and object-level access
